news.title: Yusuf Ziya Gümüşel ve Kadir İstekli'ye 'sahte kemik yaşı' davasında beşer yıl hapis: Karar neden önemli?
news.summary: Hiranur Vakfı kurucusu Yusuf Ziya Gümüşel ve reşit olmayan kızını evlendirdiği Kadir İstekli dahil dört sanık, çocuğun kemik yaşını büyütmek üzere evrakta sahtecilik yapmaktan beşer yıl hapis cezasına çaptırıldı.

news.title: Nevşehir, Keçiören ve Keşan belediye başkanları AKP'ye geçti
news.summary: İYİ Partili Nevşehir Belediye Başkanı Rasim Arı ile CHP'den istifa eden Keçiören Belediye Başkanı Mesut Özarslan ve Keşan Belediye Başkanı Mehmet Özcan AKP'ye katıldı.

news.title: Venezuela'da peş peşe iki deprem: En az 164 can kaybı
news.summary: Venezuela'da 24 Haziran'da peş peşe meydana gelen 7,2 ve 7,5 büyüklüğündeki iki depremde en az 164 kişi öldü, bine yakın yaralı var. Ülkede olağanüstü hal ilan edildi.

news.title: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
news.summary: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

news.title: People flee as building collapses on Caracas outskirts
news.summary: The capital and its surrounding areas have seen some of the worst damage from the 7.2 and 7.5 quakes, which hit a minute apart.

news.title: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
news.summary: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.

news.title: Trump asks Congress for billions for Iran war, after tension with Republicans
news.summary: But the budget faces an uphill battle as the president spars with some members of his own party over the issue.

news.title: Key figure in South Africa police corruption scandal pleads guilty
news.summary: Prosecutors say Vusimusi "Cat" Matlala could provide evidence against "high-ranking officials".

news.title: Oil price falls back to pre-Iran war levels
news.summary: Signs that traffic through the key Strait of Hormuz shipping route is gradually resuming has helped to push the oil price down.

news.title: Venezuela struggles to respond to devastating twin earthquakes
news.summary: Noris Soto says authorities appear to lack a clear response plan in the aftermath of two powerful earthquakes.

news.title: Rubio: Gulf countries don’t support Strait of Hormuz tolls
news.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said all Gulf countries oppose a toll in the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Israeli forces shoot and kill Palestinians in occupied West Bank, Gaza
news.summary: The deaths come amid escalating Israeli military raids and settler attacks across the occupied territories.

news.title: US Supreme Court paves way for government to block asylum seekers at border
news.summary: Liberal justices say the ruling 'circumvents' US law by allowing agents to prevent asylum seekers from filing a claim.

news.title: Escaping Darfur: Mothers face starvation under trees in Chad
news.summary: Fleeing scorched earth, Darfur’s mothers share harrowing tales of starvation and survival in Chad.

news.title: Spain vs Uruguay at World Cup 2026: match prediction, knockouts and lineups
news.summary: Past winners Uruguay and Spain face off in Guadalajara, battling for top-spot in Group H and a kinder knockout draw.

news.title: The Supreme Court says the U.S. can turn away asylum seekers at the border
news.summary: By a 6-3 vote, the high court ruled that federal law allows the government to stop asylum seekers from physically setting foot in the United States, effectively keeping them from applying for asylum.

news.title: Trump can begin deportations of Syrian, Haitian TPS holders, Supreme Court says
news.summary: Writing for the court majority, Justice Samuel Alito that under the TPS law, the president has unreviewable authority to end the program, without intervention from the courts.

news.title: The Viking chant that became Norway's World Cup rallying cry
news.summary: Norway's long-awaited World Cup return is being powered by a viral Viking "rowing" chant that's sweeping the world, from Boston train stations to Times Square — and the heart of Norway's parliament.

news.title: Supreme Court bars 'vampire rules' on gun ownership
news.summary: In a 6-3 ideologically divided decision, the high court said that requiring permission in advance is an undue burden on the right to possess and carry a firearm.

news.title: U.S. Supreme Court backs Monsanto in its fight against liability from popular weed killer
news.summary: The central issue in the Roundup case, filed by Missouri resident John Durnell, was who decides what should appear on a pesticide or insecticide label—and whether a federal law overrides state claims.

news.title: A federal judge in Boston has blocked parts of Trump's order to limit voting by mail
news.summary: A federal judge in Boston has blocked parts of President Trump's executive order to limit voting by mail. The Trump administration is expected to appeal the ruling.

news.title: ‘Constitutional coup’ claims as Zimbabwe senate approves extending presidential term

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
